# Security Policy\n\n## Reporting Security Vulnerabilities\n\nIf you discover a security vulnerability in Wedding Invitation Builder, please email security@wedding-app.com instead of using the public issue tracker.\n\n### What to Include\n- Type of vulnerability\n- Location of affected code\n- Steps to reproduce\n- Potential impact\n- Suggested fix (if available)\n\n### Response Timeline\n- **24 hours:** Acknowledge receipt\n- **72 hours:** Initial assessment\n- **7 days:** Security patch released\n\n## Security Best Practices\n\n### For Users\n- Change default admin password on first login\n- Use strong, unique passwords\n- Enable two-factor authentication when available\n- Keep browser updated\n- Never share login credentials\n- Report suspicious activity immediately\n\n### For Developers\n- Keep dependencies updated\n- Follow OWASP guidelines\n- Validate all user inputs\n- Use HTTPS for all communications\n- Implement proper error handling\n- Log security events\n- Perform regular security audits\n\n## Security Features Implemented\n\n✅ **Authentication**\n- Firebase Authentication\n- Session management\n- Secure password reset\n- Email verification\n\n✅ **Authorization**\n- Firestore Security Rules\n- Role-based access control\n- User isolation\n- Resource ownership validation\n\n✅ **Data Protection**\n- End-to-end encryption (HTTPS)\n- Secure storage\n- Data validation\n- Input sanitization\n\n✅ **API Security**\n- Rate limiting ready\n- CORS configuration\n- API key protection\n- Request validation\n\n✅ **Infrastructure**\n- Firebase managed infrastructure\n- DDoS protection\n- Automatic backups\n- Security monitoring\n\n## Vulnerability Disclosure\n\nWe practice responsible disclosure. Security vulnerabilities will be:\n1. Confirmed and assessed\n2. Fixed in a security patch\n3. Released publicly after patches\n4. Credited to reporter (with permission)\n\n## Regular Security Audits\n\n- Monthly: Dependency updates\n- Quarterly: Security code review\n- Annually: Third-party security audit\n- On-demand: Incident investigation\n\n## Compliance\n\n- GDPR compliant data handling\n- CCPA compliant privacy policies\n- Firebase security standards\n- Industry best practices\n\n## Support\n\nFor security concerns:\n- 📧 Email: security@wedding-app.com\n- 🔐 PGP Key: [Available upon request]\n- 📞 Emergency: [Contact info]\n\n---\n\n**Last Updated:** July 2024\n"
